programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua Former U.K. Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in strongmen.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua The anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua What drives the world's most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio The economy and the markets are under surveillance as the latest developments in finance, economics and investment is covered Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests create some intriguing conversation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg Intelligence Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.
